quotes: The wound is the place where the light enters you.
Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished.
The universe is change; our life is what our thoughts make it.
The earth has music for those who listen.
The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
In the depth of winter, I finally learned that within me there lay an invincible summer.
The clearest way into the Universe is through a forest wilderness.
The soul should always stand ajar, ready to welcome the ecstatic experience.
The deepest wisdom is to understand and accept the impermanence of all things.
The universe is not a collection of distinct objects, but a continuum, where everything is connected and interdependent.
The fire that forges the sword is the same fire that melts it.
The mystery of life is not a problem to be solved, but a reality to be lived.
The trees that are pruned, are the ones that bear the most fruit.
The winter of our discontent is the season of our greatest transformation.
The soul is not a thing, it is a breath of life, a spark of the divine.
The darkness is not the absence of light, but the presence of a different kind of radiance.
The universe is a mirror, reflecting back to us the beauty and wonder of our own inner world.
The fire that burns within us is the same fire that forges our greatest strengths.
The depths of our own soul are a mystery, a labyrinth of wonder and discovery.
The rain that falls upon us is a blessing, washing away our tears and our fears.
The ice that encases our heart is a shield, protecting us from the world, but also from our own deepest truth.
The darkest night is the one that precedes the dawn of understanding.
The heart is a sea, and love is its deepest depth.
The universe is a mirror, reflecting the beauty of our own souls.
The fire that burns within us is the flame that forges our character.
The depths of our own soul are a mystery, a labyrinth of wonder and discovery.
The trees that bend in the wind are the ones that survive the storm.
The ice that encases our heart is a shield, but it is also a prison that prevents us from feeling the warmth of love.
The gentle breeze that rustles the leaves is the same gentle breeze that soothes the soul.
The deepest depths of the ocean are not to be feared, but to be explored with gentle curiosity.
The stars are not just distant lights in the sky, but a reflection of the gentle sparkle within our own hearts.
The delicate petals of the cherry blossom are a reminder of the gentle beauty that can be found in the fleeting moments of life.
The fiery passion that burns within us is not to be feared, but to be tempered with gentle wisdom.
The darkest depths of the ocean are not to be feared, but to be explored with gentle courage.
The gentle sands of the desert are a reminder of the ever-shifting nature of life, and the importance of gentle adaptability.
The stillness of the mind is the greatest power of all.
The darkness is where the light is born.
The universe is a vast and wondrous tapestry, and we are but a single thread.
The fleeting nature of life is what makes it so precious.
The fire that burns within us is what forges our character.
The depths of our own soul are a mystery, waiting to be explored.
The stillness of the heart is what sets the soul free.
The mind is everything; what you think, you become.
The soul is a spark of the divine, a drop of the infinite ocean.
The universe is a vast, harmonious system, and we are all part of its grand symphony.
The present moment is the only moment available to us, and it is the door to all moments.
The greatest wealth is to live content with little.
The depths of our own soul are a labyrinth of wonder and mystery.
The journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
